disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Honey-coloured adherent crusts on erythematous base, superficial and non-tender, spreading contiguously — bacterial impetigo pattern (not grouped vesicles/vermilion HSV)
trigger_question_examples: Are the sores honey-coloured crusts on red skin, or small grouped blisters on the lip edge?
Are they mostly painless and crusty rather than a painful blister cluster?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're yellow crusty patches on red skin, spreading, and fairly painless — not blisters on the lip edge.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No deep, hot, spreading red painful area, no high fever/rigors, no eye swelling (excludes cellulitis/systemic sepsis)
trigger_question_examples: Any deep, hot, spreading and very painful redness, or high fever and shivering?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No deep painful redness, no fever or shivering, and my eyes are fine.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No underlying eczema flare with widespread monomorphic punched-out lesions (eczema herpeticum) and not systemically toxic
trigger_question_examples: Do you have widespread eczema that's suddenly erupted with lots of identical small punched-out sores?
Are you feeling very unwell with it?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I don't have eczema and I feel well otherwise — it's the crusty facial sores.
